items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends warm greetings to our Nari Shakti on International Women's Day
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends warm greetings to our Nari Shakti on International Women's Day Humankind is indebted to the peerless role Nari Shakti plays in society Nurturing generations and driving scientific and economic progress, they contribute to every aspect of our lives This deep gratitude drives Modi Ji's …

items.title: Rural Local Bodies of Assam Get Over
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Panchayati Raj Rural Local Bodies of Assam Get Over Rs. 299 Crores as Fifteenth Finance Commission Grants Posted On: 08 MAR 2026 6:17PM by PIB Delhi The Union Government has released XV FC Grants during FY. 2025-26, for Panchayati Raj Institutions/ Rural Local Bodies in Assam. It entails 2 nd installment of untied grants of the financial year 2025-26 amounting to Rs.…

items.title: Women in Indian Armed Forces – Expanding Roles and Opportunities

pdfs.label: Women in Indian Armed Forces – Expanding Roles and Opportuni

items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau PIB Headquarters Women in Indian Armed Forces – Expanding Roles and Opportunities Posted On: 08 MAR 2026 1:17PM by PIB Delhi Key Takeaways On International Women’s Day (8th March), the expanding leadership and operational roles of women in the Indian Armed Forces highlight their growing contribution to national defence. The number of women officers has risen from around 3,000 in…
